arts.ttl: Team news: Sheff Utd make obvious Leeds United statement
arts.sum: Leeds United have the chance to open up a seven-point gap to third place on Monday night by beating Sunderland, with Sheffield United winning to move top while Burnley could only draw 0-0 again at Preston. Leeds have the benefit of playing last this matchweek out of the top four, facing Sunderland at Elland Road looking to right the wrongs of what looked to be a certain win until the last kick of the reverse fixture.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's next five games compared to Championship promotion rivals as Burnley drop points
arts.sum: Leeds United (H) - Championship - Monday, February 24 Sheffield United (A) – Championship – Monday, February 24

arts.ttl: Rasmus Kristensen: Leeds set for imminent Eintracht talks
arts.sum: Leeds United could be looking at a permanent exit for right-back Rasmus Kristensen before the end of the season, with Eintracht Frankfurt keen to secure a transfer soon. This would put his earnings much lower at around £16,000-£20,000-per-week while Leeds are in the Championship, but the loan clause in his contract allows him to move out with another club paying his wages in the meantime, this season being Eintracht.

arts.ttl: Farke stance can help Leeds United reverse transfer trend after title push
arts.sum: Speaking at Thorp Arch on Friday, Farke admitted it is always difficult to plan long term when you don’t know what division his team will be in next season. Leeds will be more appealing to players once a Premier League club, which is vital due to the need to bolster the squad to make it top-tier ready.

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Sunderland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
